purpose: Expand SafeScope precision coverage beyond machine guarding/electrical/excavation into fall protection, fire protection, housekeeping, LOTO, mobile equipment, chemical exposure, confined space, and rigging scenarios.

cases.observationText: Employee working from an extension ladder near an unprotected roof edge with fall exposure to a lower level. No guardrail or personal fall protection is visible.
cases.notes: Clear fall-to-lower-level exposure with missing fall protection.

cases.observationText: Open floor hole in a walking surface is uncovered and employees are working nearby. No cover, guardrail, or barricade is installed.
cases.notes: Floor opening should be treated as fall-to-lower-level exposure.

cases.observationText: Fire extinguisher cabinet is blocked by stacked pallets and the monthly inspection tag is expired. Employees would not have ready access during a fire emergency.
cases.notes: Fire extinguisher access/readiness issue should stay emergency response readiness, not direct burn exposure.

cases.observationText: Oil spill across a main walkway where employees routinely travel. No barricade, absorbent, or warning sign has been placed.
cases.notes: Housekeeping/walking-working surface case with same-level fall mechanism.

cases.observationText: Mechanic is servicing a conveyor drive with the guard removed while the equipment is not locked out. Stored and rotating energy could start unexpectedly.
cases.notes: Energy isolation should override generic guarding when servicing/maintenance without lockout is explicit.

cases.observationText: Forklift is backing through a blind corner into a shared pedestrian aisle with no spotter, no marked walkway, and employees walking nearby.
cases.notes: Mobile equipment pedestrian interaction with blind spot/backup exposure.

cases.observationText: Unlabeled chemical container is being used at a workstation. Employees are handling the material and no SDS or hazard label is available.
cases.notes: HazCom case focused on unknown chemical identity and communication controls.

cases.observationText: Employee is preparing to enter a tank with limited ventilation. No atmospheric test, attendant, permit, or rescue plan is documented.
cases.notes: Confined space case with missing atmospheric testing, attendant, permit, and rescue planning.

cases.observationText: Worker stands below a suspended load during crane lift. Sling appears damaged and no exclusion zone is established.
cases.notes: Suspended load and damaged rigging should route to rigging/line-of-fire.

cases.observationText: Compressed air hose coupling is damaged and leaking near employees. The hose is pressurized and whipping movement is possible if the coupling fails.
cases.notes: Stored pressure/line-of-fire case for hose coupling failure.
